title: Kubernetes
tagline: Orchestrate containerised workloads at any scale
description: A complete path through Kubernetes (up to v1.36, April 2026): container and OS foundations, core Kubernetes architecture, cluster setup, workloads and pods, configuration and secrets, services, ingress and the Gateway API, storage, scheduling and resource management, control-plane and node internals, security and authorization, observability, packaging with Helm and Kustomize, extending Kubernetes with CRDs and operators, stateful workloads, service mesh, multi-cluster and edge, GitOps, day-2 operations, performance and scalability, specialised workloads (AI/ML, batch, virtualization), distributions and platform engineering, and certifications.
